description: Unit: designer build path produces a grouped action catalog abstraction separate from the runtime action registry
Unit: built-in grouped palette entries serialize as core-object catalog records
Unit: Transform serializes as a transform catalog record
Unit: plugin/app grouped palette entries serialize as app catalog records

Unit: grouped catalog records include a display label

Unit: time actions are grouped into the Time catalog record

API: the workflow designer receives the grouped catalog projection

Review: the implementation stays within grouped palette, inline inputs, ticket-core pickers, and transform actions without unplanned feature creep
E2E: builder creates a workflow by dragging Ticket, choosing Create Ticket, filling required fields through the inline editor, and saving successfully
E2E: builder creates a workflow by dragging Ticket, choosing Find Ticket, and then switching to Create Ticket without losing still-valid fields
E2E: builder creates a workflow by dragging Transform, choosing truncate-text, saving the output, and referencing it from a later Ticket step
E2E: builder creates a workflow by dragging Transform, choosing build-object, renaming fields, and referencing the resulting object from a later action
E2E: searching create ticket highlights the Ticket tile, not a hidden action tile, and click insertion creates the correct grouped step
E2E: searching truncate highlights the Transform tile and click insertion creates the correct grouped step
E2E: an existing legacy action.call workflow draft opens in the grouped-step UI without migration and can be saved again successfully
E2E: builder uses a fixed board picker, fixed status picker, and fixed priority picker to author a ticket action without entering raw IDs
E2E: builder uses a prior contacts.find output to populate contact_id through Reference mode while using fixed pickers for other ticket fields
E2E: builder uses a fixed client to unlock contact and location pickers, then changes the client and sees dependent choices update correctly
E2E: builder uses a fixed board to unlock category and subcategory pickers, then changes the board and sees dependent choices update correctly
E2E: builder uses dynamic references for client and board and sees dependent fixed pickers remain disabled with clear explanations
E2E: builder authors a grouped step entirely through structured references and never opens Advanced mode
E2E: builder falls back to Advanced mode for a legacy expression and the workflow still saves, reloads, and publishes
E2E: builder mixes structured field authoring, fixed ticket pickers, and transform outputs in a single workflow draft and saves successfully
E2E: a grouped action step inside a forEach block still exposes loop item and index references in the inline field editor
E2E: a grouped action step inside a catch block still exposes error references in the inline field editor
E2E: grouped action steps remain reorderable and still preserve their selected action and authored field values
E2E: grouped action steps moved across branches preserve action selection and valid field values
E2E: read-only workflow users can inspect grouped steps and transform outputs but cannot edit them
E2E: app/plugin tiles render when available and can create grouped steps with filtered action dropdowns
E2E: app/plugin grouped steps can use the inline field editor when their schemas are supported
Integration: grouped-step validation continues to block publish when required fields are missing after action changes
Integration: grouped-step validation errors remain attached to the correct step after save and reload
Integration: fixed picker values and structured references round-trip through draft save/load without contract drift
Integration: transform outputs remain browseable by downstream reference pickers after draft save/load
Integration: build-object and rename-fields preserve output field names in downstream reference autocomplete
Integration: the grouped palette model does not break workflow import/export of unchanged action.call definitions
Permissions: ticket-core picker option retrieval respects the current workflow authoring user's existing data-read permissions
Plan conformance: the shipped implementation can be mapped cleanly to the scoped feature set without unrelated workflow-editor scope expansion
Unit: palette search remains interactive while grouped palette drag state is active
